====Pokémon====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Hala
|pkmn=Bewear
|type1=Normal
|type2=Fighting
|img=Hala Bewear Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM03
|epname=Pokémon Move Specialist Professor Kukui
|desc={{p|Bewear}} is Hala's first known Pokémon. It was first seen with its {{pkmn|Trainer}} watching a {{pkmn|battle}} between Nanu and Olivia. When Hala stepped in to stop Nanu and Olivia from using their Z-Moves, Bewear caught Hala after the latter was knocked to the ground after being hit by Olivia's {{p|Lycanroc}}. Later, it fought a {{p|Kartana}} and {{p|Buzzwole}} that invaded Hala's home.

Bewear's only known move is {{m|Hyper Beam}}.}}

|desc={{p|Hariyama}} is Hala's second known Pokémon. It was first used to battle a {{p|Kartana}} and {{p|Buzzwole}} that invaded Hala's home.

Hariyama's only known move is {{m|Close Combat}}{{tt|*|mentioned and used off-panel}}.}}
